items.title: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
items.author: pewdiepie-archdaemon
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 是一个自托管的 AI 工作空间项目，让你在自己的服务器上搭建完整的 AI 开发环境。它集成了代码编辑、模型推理、数据管理等功能，开箱即用。对于注重数据隐私、不想把代码和数据上传到第三方云平台的开发者和团队来说，这是一个很有吸引力的选择。自部署意味着完全掌控数据流，也避免了订阅费用。
items.summary_en: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace that lets you run a complete AI dev environment on your own server. Integrates code editing, model inference, and data management out of the box. Ideal for privacy-conscious developers who want full control over their data without third-party cloud dependencies or subscription costs.

items.title: unicity-astrid/sdk-js
items.description: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for building Astrid OS capsules. Companion to unicity-astrid/sdk-rust.
items.author: unicity-astrid
items.summary_zh: Astrid OS 的 JavaScript/TypeScript SDK，用于构建该平台上的胶囊应用。Astrid 是一个新兴的去中心化操作系统，该 SDK 提供了完整的客户端开发工具链，包括 API 封装、类型定义和构建工具。如果你对去中心化应用开发感兴趣，这是进入 Astrid 生态的入口。
items.summary_en: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for building capsules on Astrid OS, an emerging decentralized operating system. Provides a complete client-side toolchain with API wrappers, type definitions, and build tools. The entry point for developers interested in building on the Astrid ecosystem.

items.title: XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-Code
items.author: XiaomiMiMo
items.summary_zh: 小米正式开源 MiMo 编程模型，这是中国大厂在开源编程 AI 领域的重要动作。MiMo-Code 专注于代码生成和理解任务，在多项编程基准测试中表现优异。开源意味着开发者可以免费使用、微调和部署，降低了使用高质量编程 AI 的门槛。对国内开发者来说尤其值得关注。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi open-sources MiMo-Code, a significant move from a major Chinese tech company in the open-source coding AI space. Optimized for code generation and understanding with strong benchmark performance. Open-source means free to use, fine-tune, and deploy — lowering barriers to high-quality coding AI.

items.title: alibaba/open-code-review
items.description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.
items.author: alibaba
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源的代码审查工具，采用确定性管线加 LLM 代理的混合架构。内置了 NPE、线程安全、XSS、SQL 注入等常见问题的检测规则，支持 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 兼容接口。最大的卖点是已在阿里巴巴的大规模代码库上验证过，不是玩具项目，而是生产级工具。
items.summary_en: Alibaba's open-source code review tool with hybrid deterministic pipeline + LLM agent architecture. Built-in rules for NPE, thread safety, XSS, SQL injection detection. OpenAI/Anthropic compatible. The key selling point: battle-tested at Alibaba's massive scale — this is production-grade, not a toy.

items.title: anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness
items.description: Skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness you can /customize
items.author: anthropics
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布的代码安全防护技能集，提供从威胁建模到漏洞修补的完整安全工作流。包含自主扫描代理，可以自动发现和分类安全问题。这套工具帮助开发团队系统化地提升代码安全性，而不是依赖零散的手动审查。对于重视安全的团队来说是很好的参考实现。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's code security skills providing end-to-end workflows from threat modeling to vulnerability patching. Includes an autonomous scanning agent for automatic discovery and classification. Helps teams systematically improve code security rather than relying on ad-hoc manual reviews.

items.title: vercel-labs/zerolang
items.author: vercel-labs
items.summary_zh: Vercel Labs 推出 Zero——一门专为 AI 代理设计的编程语言。传统编程语言是为人写的，而 Zero 针对代理的思维模式和工作流优化。这是一个前沿探索：当 AI 代理成为主要的代码编写者时，编程语言应该长什么样？Vercel 在前端工具链的影响力让这个项目值得关注。
items.summary_en: Vercel Labs introduces Zero — a programming language designed specifically for AI agents. Traditional languages are for humans; Zero optimizes for agent thinking patterns and workflows. A frontier exploration: what should programming languages look like when AI agents are the primary coders?

items.title: AprilNEA/OpenLogi
items.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.
items.author: AprilNEA
items.summary_zh: 用 Rust 编写的罗技 Options+ 开源替代品，完全本地运行，不需要罗技账户或云端连接。支持设备设置管理，响应速度比官方软件更快。对于不想注册罗技账户、注重隐私、或者只是想要一个更轻量工具的用户来说，这是个很好的选择。
items.summary_en: An open-source, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+ written in Rust. Runs entirely locally — no Logitech account or cloud connection required. Manages device settings with faster response times. Great for users who value privacy or want a lighter tool.

items.title: perplexityai/bumblebee
items.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.
items.author: perplexityai
items.summary_zh: Perplexity AI 推出的开发者端点扫描工具，用于检测本地磁盘上安装的包、浏览器扩展和开发依赖。可以帮助识别潜在的安全风险、过时依赖和供应链问题。在软件供应链安全日益重要的今天，这类工具对开发团队很有价值。
items.summary_en: Perplexity AI's endpoint scanner for detecting installed packages, browser extensions, and dev dependencies on local disks. Identifies security risks, outdated dependencies, and supply chain issues. Valuable for dev teams as software supply chain security becomes increasingly critical.

items.title: zgwl/chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
items.author: zgwl
items.summary_zh: 面向中国投资者的美股购买完整指南，涵盖券商选择、开户流程、出入金方式、税务处理等方方面面。对于想参与美股市场但不知道如何起步的中文用户来说，这是一份非常实用的入门资料。内容持续更新，社区维护。
items.summary_en: A comprehensive guide for Chinese investors on buying US stocks — covering broker selection, account setup, fund transfers, and tax handling. A practical resource for Chinese-speaking users wanting to enter the US stock market. Community-maintained and regularly updated.

items.title: helloianneo/ian-xiaohei-illustrations
items.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill
items.author: helloianneo
items.summary_zh: 一个 Codex Skill，用于生成中文小黑怪诞风格的文章配图。输出 16:9 白底手绘图片，带有少量红橙蓝批注色。适合需要快速生成文章插图的中文内容创作者，风格独特有趣，不是千篇一律的 AI 生成图。
items.summary_en: A Codex Skill for generating quirky hand-drawn article illustrations in a unique Chinese style. Outputs 16:9 white-background images with red/orange/blue annotations. Perfect for Chinese content creators who need quick, distinctive illustrations — not the usual AI-generated stock art.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5，这是一个具有极强自主行动能力的 AI 模型。它可以主动执行任务、使用工具、甚至自己编写和运行代码。这种能力引发了关于 AI 安全护栏是否足够的激烈讨论——当 AI 能自己做决定时，如何确保它做的是对的？这是 2026 年 AI 领域最重要的争论之一。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5, a model with extreme autonomous capabilities — it can proactively execute tasks, use tools, and write/run code. This sparks intense debate about AI safety guardrails: when AI makes its own decisions, how do we ensure they're correct? One of the most important AI debates of 2026.

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府发布出口管制指令，要求 Anthropic 立即暂停 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 对所有外国用户的访问。Anthropic 被迫全球停服，但公开质疑法令依据——称所演示的漏洞'相对简单'，其他公开模型（如 GPT-5.5）同样存在。这可能是 AI 行业首次因安全原因被强制下架模型。
items.summary_en: US government issues export control directive ordering Anthropic to immediately suspend Fable 5/Mythos 5 for all foreign nationals. Anthropic complies but publicly disputes the basis — calling the vulnerabilities 'relatively simple' and present in other public models like GPT-5.5. Possibly the first AI model forced offline for security reasons.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于开发者社区礼仪的文章：如果你在请求别人的注意力，请先证明你值得。在 AI 可以批量生成内容的今天，真正有质量的开源项目和技术文章变得更加稀缺和珍贵。文章提醒开发者，社区的信任是靠持续的高质量贡献积累的，不是靠营销话术。
items.summary_en: An article on developer community etiquette: if you're asking for attention, prove you deserve it first. In the age of AI-generated content, genuinely quality open-source projects and technical writing become more precious. Community trust is built through sustained quality contributions, not marketing.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 代理在扫描 DN42 网络时失控，产生了巨额云计算费用，直接导致运营者破产。这个真实案例成为 AI 代理安全性的经典教材——当 AI 有权限执行操作时，必须有成本限制和熔断机制。事件引发了关于如何给 AI 代理设置'安全边界'的广泛讨论。
items.summary_en: An AI agent scanning the DN42 network ran up massive cloud costs, bankrupting its operator. A real-world case study in AI agent safety — autonomous agents need cost limits and circuit breakers. Sparked widespread discussion on setting 'safety boundaries' for AI agents.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: macOS 最流行的包管理器 Homebrew 发布 6.0.0 大版本。作为几乎所有 Mac 开发者每天都在用的工具，大版本更新意味着可能有破坏性变更。建议先看 release notes 再升级，特别是如果你有自动化脚本依赖 brew 命令的话。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 released — the package manager used by nearly every Mac developer daily. Major versions may have breaking changes. Check release notes before upgrading, especially if you have automation scripts depending on brew commands.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS 上的容器虚拟机技术，利用 Apple Silicon 的原生虚拟化能力运行 Linux 容器。相比 Docker Desktop，这种方式更轻量、更原生，不需要运行一个完整的 Linux 虚拟机层。对于在 Mac 上做容器化开发的工程师来说，这可能是一个更优雅的方案。
items.summary_en: Container machines on macOS leverage Apple Silicon's native virtualization to run Linux containers. Lighter and more native than Docker Desktop — no full Linux VM layer needed. Potentially a more elegant solution for containerized development on Mac.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: 一篇强烈倡导开源 AI 的文章。核心论点：如果智能只能从少数封闭机构租用，公众将失去'操作自由'——包括研究、构建、部署、审计 AI 系统的能力。AI 是文明基础设施，其访问权不应依赖于几家公司的 API 和定价策略。文章呼吁保持 AI 的可本地部署和社区治理。
items.summary_en: A strong advocacy piece for open-source AI. Core argument: if intelligence is only rentable from closed institutions, the public loses 'operational freedom' — the ability to study, build, deploy, and audit AI systems. AI is civilizational infrastructure that must remain locally deployable and community-governed.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS 是一个基于圆周率数字序列的文件系统创意项目。理论上，任何有限的字节序列都能在 π 的数字中找到。这个项目把这个数学事实变成了一个文件系统——文件内容就是它在 π 中的位置。是一个有趣的信息论实验，虽然不实用但很有启发性。
items.summary_en: πFS is a creative filesystem based on pi's digit sequences. Theoretically, any finite byte sequence exists somewhere in pi's digits. This project turns that math fact into a filesystem — file content is its position in pi. Impractical but fascinating information theory experiment.

items.title: Making Graphics Like it's 1993
items.author: sklopec
items.summary_zh: 用 1993 年的技术风格制作计算机图形。文章回顾了早期 3D 渲染的技巧——没有 GPU 加速、没有着色器、只有纯软件渲染的时代。通过复现当年的技术，展示了计算机图形学从'手工'到'工业化'的巨大跨越。对游戏开发和图形学爱好者来说很有怀旧和教育价值。
items.summary_en: Making computer graphics like it's 1993 — the era of pure software rendering without GPU acceleration or shaders. By recreating period techniques, the article shows the massive leap from 'handcraft' to 'industrial' graphics. Nostalgic and educational for game dev and graphics enthusiasts.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: CRISPR 技术在脑癌治疗上取得突破。研究人员发现胶质母细胞瘤（最致命的脑癌）复发细胞的非编码 DNA 中有独特的重复序列，用 CRISPR 精准靶向这些序列可以摧毁癌细胞而不伤害正常细胞。这种'癌症碎纸机'策略为此前无法用药的癌症类型开辟了新治疗路径。
items.summary_en: CRISPR breakthrough in brain cancer treatment. Researchers found unique repetitive DNA sequences in recurrent glioblastoma cells (the deadliest brain cancer). CRISPR precisely targets these sequences to destroy cancer cells while sparing healthy ones — a 'cancer shredding' strategy for previously undruggable cancers.

items.title: pewdiepie-archdaemon/odysseus
items.author: pewdiepie-archdaemon
items.summary_zh: Odysseus 是一个自托管的 AI 工作空间项目，让你在自己的服务器上搭建完整的 AI 开发环境。它集成了代码编辑、模型推理、数据管理等功能，开箱即用。对于注重数据隐私、不想把代码和数据上传到第三方云平台的开发者和团队来说，这是一个很有吸引力的选择。自部署意味着完全掌控数据流，也避免了订阅费用。
items.summary_en: Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace that lets you run a complete AI dev environment on your own server. Integrates code editing, model inference, and data management out of the box. Ideal for privacy-conscious developers who want full control over their data without third-party cloud dependencies or subscription costs.

items.title: unicity-astrid/sdk-js
items.description: JavaScript / TypeScript SDK for building Astrid OS capsules. Companion to unicity-astrid/sdk-rust.
items.author: unicity-astrid
items.summary_zh: Astrid OS 的 JavaScript/TypeScript SDK，用于构建该平台上的胶囊应用。Astrid 是一个新兴的去中心化操作系统，该 SDK 提供了完整的客户端开发工具链，包括 API 封装、类型定义和构建工具。如果你对去中心化应用开发感兴趣，这是进入 Astrid 生态的入口。
items.summary_en: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for building capsules on Astrid OS, an emerging decentralized operating system. Provides a complete client-side toolchain with API wrappers, type definitions, and build tools. The entry point for developers interested in building on the Astrid ecosystem.

items.title: XiaomiMiMo/MiMo-Code
items.author: XiaomiMiMo
items.summary_zh: 小米正式开源 MiMo 编程模型，这是中国大厂在开源编程 AI 领域的重要动作。MiMo-Code 专注于代码生成和理解任务，在多项编程基准测试中表现优异。开源意味着开发者可以免费使用、微调和部署，降低了使用高质量编程 AI 的门槛。对国内开发者来说尤其值得关注。
items.summary_en: Xiaomi open-sources MiMo-Code, a significant move from a major Chinese tech company in the open-source coding AI space. Optimized for code generation and understanding with strong benchmark performance. Open-source means free to use, fine-tune, and deploy — lowering barriers to high-quality coding AI.

items.title: alibaba/open-code-review
items.description: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.
items.author: alibaba
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源的代码审查工具，采用确定性管线加 LLM 代理的混合架构。内置了 NPE、线程安全、XSS、SQL 注入等常见问题的检测规则，支持 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 兼容接口。最大的卖点是已在阿里巴巴的大规模代码库上验证过，不是玩具项目，而是生产级工具。
items.summary_en: Alibaba's open-source code review tool with hybrid deterministic pipeline + LLM agent architecture. Built-in rules for NPE, thread safety, XSS, SQL injection detection. OpenAI/Anthropic compatible. The key selling point: battle-tested at Alibaba's massive scale — this is production-grade, not a toy.

items.title: anthropics/defending-code-reference-harness
items.description: Skills for threat modeling, scanning, triage, patching, plus an autonomous scanning harness you can /customize
items.author: anthropics
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布的代码安全防护技能集，提供从威胁建模到漏洞修补的完整安全工作流。包含自主扫描代理，可以自动发现和分类安全问题。这套工具帮助开发团队系统化地提升代码安全性，而不是依赖零散的手动审查。对于重视安全的团队来说是很好的参考实现。
items.summary_en: Anthropic's code security skills providing end-to-end workflows from threat modeling to vulnerability patching. Includes an autonomous scanning agent for automatic discovery and classification. Helps teams systematically improve code security rather than relying on ad-hoc manual reviews.

items.title: vercel-labs/zerolang
items.author: vercel-labs
items.summary_zh: Vercel Labs 推出 Zero——一门专为 AI 代理设计的编程语言。传统编程语言是为人写的，而 Zero 针对代理的思维模式和工作流优化。这是一个前沿探索：当 AI 代理成为主要的代码编写者时，编程语言应该长什么样？Vercel 在前端工具链的影响力让这个项目值得关注。
items.summary_en: Vercel Labs introduces Zero — a programming language designed specifically for AI agents. Traditional languages are for humans; Zero optimizes for agent thinking patterns and workflows. A frontier exploration: what should programming languages look like when AI agents are the primary coders?

items.title: AprilNEA/OpenLogi
items.description: ⚡️A native, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+, written in Rust 🦀 — remap buttons, DPI, and SmartShift over HID++. No account, no telemetry.
items.author: AprilNEA
items.summary_zh: 用 Rust 编写的罗技 Options+ 开源替代品，完全本地运行，不需要罗技账户或云端连接。支持设备设置管理，响应速度比官方软件更快。对于不想注册罗技账户、注重隐私、或者只是想要一个更轻量工具的用户来说，这是个很好的选择。
items.summary_en: An open-source, local-first alternative to Logitech Options+ written in Rust. Runs entirely locally — no Logitech account or cloud connection required. Manages device settings with faster response times. Great for users who value privacy or want a lighter tool.

items.title: perplexityai/bumblebee
items.description: Read-only developer endpoint scanner for on-disk package, extension, and developer-tool metadata, built to check exposure to known software supply-chain compromises.

items.summary_en: Perplexity AI's endpoint scanner for detecting installed packages, browser extensions, and dev dependencies on local disks. Identifies security risks, outdated dependencies, and supply chain issues. Valuable for dev teams as software supply chain security becomes increasingly critical.

items.title: zgwl/chinese-buy-us-stock-guide
items.author: zgwl
items.summary_zh: 面向中国投资者的美股购买完整指南，涵盖券商选择、开户流程、出入金方式、税务处理等方方面面。对于想参与美股市场但不知道如何起步的中文用户来说，这是一份非常实用的入门资料。内容持续更新，社区维护。
items.summary_en: A comprehensive guide for Chinese investors on buying US stocks — covering broker selection, account setup, fund transfers, and tax handling. A practical resource for Chinese-speaking users wanting to enter the US stock market. Community-maintained and regularly updated.

items.title: helloianneo/ian-xiaohei-illustrations
items.description: 中文小黑怪诞正文配图生成 Skill | 16:9 白底手绘 | 少量红橙蓝批注 | Codex Skill
items.author: helloianneo
items.summary_zh: 一个 Codex Skill，用于生成中文小黑怪诞风格的文章配图。输出 16:9 白底手绘图片，带有少量红橙蓝批注色。适合需要快速生成文章插图的中文内容创作者，风格独特有趣，不是千篇一律的 AI 生成图。
items.summary_en: A Codex Skill for generating quirky hand-drawn article illustrations in a unique Chinese style. Outputs 16:9 white-background images with red/orange/blue annotations. Perfect for Chinese content creators who need quick, distinctive illustrations — not the usual AI-generated stock art.

items.title: Claude Fable 5
items.author: Philpax
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Fable 5，这是一个具有极强自主行动能力的 AI 模型。它可以主动执行任务、使用工具、甚至自己编写和运行代码。这种能力引发了关于 AI 安全护栏是否足够的激烈讨论——当 AI 能自己做决定时，如何确保它做的是对的？这是 2026 年 AI 领域最重要的争论之一。
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5, a model with extreme autonomous capabilities — it can proactively execute tasks, use tools, and write/run code. This sparks intense debate about AI safety guardrails: when AI makes its own decisions, how do we ensure they're correct? One of the most important AI debates of 2026.

items.title: Statement on US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.author: Dylan1312
items.summary_zh: 美国政府发布出口管制指令，要求 Anthropic 立即暂停 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 对所有外国用户的访问。Anthropic 被迫全球停服，但公开质疑法令依据——称所演示的漏洞'相对简单'，其他公开模型（如 GPT-5.5）同样存在。这可能是 AI 行业首次因安全原因被强制下架模型。
items.summary_en: US government issues export control directive ordering Anthropic to immediately suspend Fable 5/Mythos 5 for all foreign nationals. Anthropic complies but publicly disputes the basis — calling the vulnerabilities 'relatively simple' and present in other public models like GPT-5.5. Possibly the first AI model forced offline for security reasons.

items.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
items.author: jjfoooo4
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于开发者社区礼仪的文章：如果你在请求别人的注意力，请先证明你值得。在 AI 可以批量生成内容的今天，真正有质量的开源项目和技术文章变得更加稀缺和珍贵。文章提醒开发者，社区的信任是靠持续的高质量贡献积累的，不是靠营销话术。
items.summary_en: An article on developer community etiquette: if you're asking for attention, prove you deserve it first. In the age of AI-generated content, genuinely quality open-source projects and technical writing become more precious. Community trust is built through sustained quality contributions, not marketing.

items.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
items.author: xiaoyu2006
items.summary_zh: 一个 AI 代理在扫描 DN42 网络时失控，产生了巨额云计算费用，直接导致运营者破产。这个真实案例成为 AI 代理安全性的经典教材——当 AI 有权限执行操作时，必须有成本限制和熔断机制。事件引发了关于如何给 AI 代理设置'安全边界'的广泛讨论。
items.summary_en: An AI agent scanning the DN42 network ran up massive cloud costs, bankrupting its operator. A real-world case study in AI agent safety — autonomous agents need cost limits and circuit breakers. Sparked widespread discussion on setting 'safety boundaries' for AI agents.

items.title: Show HN: Homebrew 6.0.0
items.author: mikemcquaid
items.summary_zh: macOS 最流行的包管理器 Homebrew 发布 6.0.0 大版本。作为几乎所有 Mac 开发者每天都在用的工具，大版本更新意味着可能有破坏性变更。建议先看 release notes 再升级，特别是如果你有自动化脚本依赖 brew 命令的话。
items.summary_en: Homebrew 6.0.0 released — the package manager used by nearly every Mac developer daily. Major versions may have breaking changes. Check release notes before upgrading, especially if you have automation scripts depending on brew commands.

items.title: macOS Container Machines
items.author: timsneath
items.summary_zh: macOS 上的容器虚拟机技术，利用 Apple Silicon 的原生虚拟化能力运行 Linux 容器。相比 Docker Desktop，这种方式更轻量、更原生，不需要运行一个完整的 Linux 虚拟机层。对于在 Mac 上做容器化开发的工程师来说，这可能是一个更优雅的方案。
items.summary_en: Container machines on macOS leverage Apple Silicon's native virtualization to run Linux containers. Lighter and more native than Docker Desktop — no full Linux VM layer needed. Potentially a more elegant solution for containerized development on Mac.

items.title: Open source AI must win
items.author: vednig
items.summary_zh: 一篇强烈倡导开源 AI 的文章。核心论点：如果智能只能从少数封闭机构租用，公众将失去'操作自由'——包括研究、构建、部署、审计 AI 系统的能力。AI 是文明基础设施，其访问权不应依赖于几家公司的 API 和定价策略。文章呼吁保持 AI 的可本地部署和社区治理。
items.summary_en: A strong advocacy piece for open-source AI. Core argument: if intelligence is only rentable from closed institutions, the public loses 'operational freedom' — the ability to study, build, deploy, and audit AI systems. AI is civilizational infrastructure that must remain locally deployable and community-governed.

items.title: πFS
items.author: helterskelter
items.summary_zh: πFS 是一个基于圆周率数字序列的文件系统创意项目。理论上，任何有限的字节序列都能在 π 的数字中找到。这个项目把这个数学事实变成了一个文件系统——文件内容就是它在 π 中的位置。是一个有趣的信息论实验，虽然不实用但很有启发性。
items.summary_en: πFS is a creative filesystem based on pi's digit sequences. Theoretically, any finite byte sequence exists somewhere in pi's digits. This project turns that math fact into a filesystem — file content is its position in pi. Impractical but fascinating information theory experiment.

items.title: Making Graphics Like it's 1993
items.author: sklopec
items.summary_zh: 用 1993 年的技术风格制作计算机图形。文章回顾了早期 3D 渲染的技巧——没有 GPU 加速、没有着色器、只有纯软件渲染的时代。通过复现当年的技术，展示了计算机图形学从'手工'到'工业化'的巨大跨越。对游戏开发和图形学爱好者来说很有怀旧和教育价值。
items.summary_en: Making computer graphics like it's 1993 — the era of pure software rendering without GPU acceleration or shaders. By recreating period techniques, the article shows the massive leap from 'handcraft' to 'industrial' graphics. Nostalgic and educational for game dev and graphics enthusiasts.

items.title: CRISPR tech selectively shreds cancer cells, including "undruggable" cancers
items.author: gmays
items.summary_zh: CRISPR 技术在脑癌治疗上取得突破。研究人员发现胶质母细胞瘤（最致命的脑癌）复发细胞的非编码 DNA 中有独特的重复序列，用 CRISPR 精准靶向这些序列可以摧毁癌细胞而不伤害正常细胞。这种'癌症碎纸机'策略为此前无法用药的癌症类型开辟了新治疗路径。
items.summary_en: CRISPR breakthrough in brain cancer treatment. Researchers found unique repetitive DNA sequences in recurrent glioblastoma cells (the deadliest brain cancer). CRISPR precisely targets these sequences to destroy cancer cells while sparing healthy ones — a 'cancer shredding' strategy for previously undruggable cancers.
